scores.notes: Significant OCR errors with misspellings (e.g., 'Jucvie Gerkold', 'Ur\Gornin', 'Lewke nc'), garbled words (e.g., 'thie?', 'AT¥03 Gor cz ant Theo ugh way'), and inconsistent numeric data (e.g., '7°25-05-11', 'z year(s) 1° month(s)', '34° dollars'). Table structure is weak but some numeric alignment is preserved. Layout and section order mostly maintained. Most text appears captured but with many recognition errors.
